title: Satori’s Tricks Break Apart
description: The Straw Hats fight back against Satori’s tricks, turning confusion and panic into a direct counterattack.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene centers on Eneru, Satori, Narrator, Luffy, Sanji. The Straw Hats fight back against Satori’s tricks, turning confusion and panic into a direct counterattack.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....what the...? Wasn't that on the ground...?

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: Eh!? It's just a wooden board?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No, no, no! It's like this, USOP!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You two are too relaxed! Idiots!

summary: The Straw Hats fight back against Satori’s tricks, turning confusion and panic into a direct counterattack.
